name: send_message
description: Send a message in a conversation. Supports text, files, and structured content like picker cards.

parameters.name: website_id
parameters.description: The unique identifier for your Crisp website.

parameters.name: session_id
parameters.description: The session identifier for the conversation.

parameters.name: type
parameters.description: Message type. One of: text, file, animation, picker, field, note.

parameters.name: content
parameters.description: The message content. Plain text for text type, URL for file type.
parameters.example: Hello! How can I help you today?

parameters.name: from
parameters.description: Who sends the message. One of: operator, user.

parameters.name: origin
parameters.description: The origin of the message, typically 'chat'.

body.content: Hello! How can I help you today?
